label: STATE OF THE ART
headline: The Brain Behind the Performance
description: We don't just count steps. Coach Watts uses a multi-layered AI pipeline to construct a "Digital Twin" of your physiology.
context_desc: Most platforms analyze a workout in isolation. Coach Watts analyzes it in the context of your entire history, your nutrition, and your recovery.
feat1_desc: We unite data from all your connected sources into a single, comprehensive view. This solves the "fragmented data" problem.
feat2_desc: Every new workout is analyzed by our AI Coach to extract qualitative insights (e.g., "The athlete struggled with power in the third interval due to potential fatigue").
feat3_desc: These event insights feed into a persistent "Athlete Profile." This living profile evolves daily, tracking fatigue resistance, recovery patterns, and mental resilience.
feat4_desc: When the Daily Coach runs, it reads the Athlete Profile, not just the raw data. This allows it to say "Your recovery is low, and historically you get sick when training in this state" rather than just "HRV is low."
coach_output: "Based on your profile, you respond best to rest when HRV drops below 40ms. Let's take today off."
